title: Army of the Orcs buffs creatures with Orc in their name

card.rawText: All creatures with "Orc" in their name: SPD: +3. Atk: +6. Atk Dice Rolls: +1.

effect.target: All creatures with "Orc" in their name

plan.title: Army of the Orcs buffs creatures with Orc in their name
plan.summary: Play Army of the Orcs as field magic and verify an Orc-named creature receives the printed SPD and Atk Dice Roll bonuses.

notes: Use Test Orc Scout because its name contains "Orc".

steps: Player 1 plays Army of the Orcs as field magic.
Read the Orc-named creature's effective SPD and attack dice.

expectedAssertions.label: Orc-named creature attack dice increased by 1
Army of the Orcs remains in magic slot

manualVerification: Confirm creatures without "Orc" in their name do not receive this aura.
Confirm Atk +6 is reflected in battle damage without double-counting the attack dice aura.
riskNotes: This fixture validates name targeting and direct stat outputs; damage output is left to a separate adapter pass.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Army of the Orcs field aura for Orc-named creatures.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
